Notice And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp Section 998 Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS EDNA LEVI and JERRY LEVI'S Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To Ccp Section 998 Settlement.

Plaintiffs' "motion for attorneys' fees and costs of suit pursuant to the terms of settlement" is ordered off calendar so both sides can comply with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). After compliance with the above, counsel shall meet and confer about a re-noticed hearing date and consult with a Department 302 clerk.
